name: Zabs
description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

args.name: value
args.description: The number to get the absolute value of.

name: ZaddButton
description: Adds a button to the bot's response. Buttons are grouped into action rows automatically.

args.name: newRow
args.description: If true, starts a new action row before this button.

args.name: customID
args.description: The custom ID used to identify this button in onInteraction handlers. Use a URL for link buttons.

args.name: style
args.description: Button style: primary, secondary, success, danger, or link.

args.name: emoji
args.description: Emoji to display on the button (custom emoji ID or unicode).

examples.output: Adds a red Cancel button on a new row

name: ZaddCmdReactions
description: Adds reactions to the message that triggered the command.
errors: at least one emoji is required
no trigger message available (slash commands don't have a trigger message)

name: ZaddEmoji
description: Downloads the image, base64-encodes it, and creates a guild emoji.

name: ZaddField
description: Adds content to the current embed.
errors: embeds cannot have more than 25 fields
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZaddMentionableSelect
description: Adds a mentionable select menu (users and roles) to the response.

args.name: menuID
args.description: The custom ID used to identify this menu in onInteraction handlers.

args.name: min
args.description: Minimum number of items that must be selected.

args.name: max
args.description: Maximum number of items that can be selected.

args.name: placeholder
args.description: Placeholder text shown when nothing is selected.

name: ZaddMessageReactions
description: Returns information for the addMessageReactions function.
errors: requires channelID, messageID, and at least one emoji

name: ZaddReactions
description: Queues reactions to be added to the bot's own response after it is sent.
errors: at least one emoji is required

name: ZaddRoleSelect
description: Adds a role select menu to the response. Users can pick from server roles.

args.name: menuID
args.description: The custom ID used to identify this menu in onInteraction handlers.

args.name: min
args.description: Minimum number of roles that must be selected.

args.name: max
args.description: Maximum number of roles that can be selected.

args.name: placeholder
args.description: Placeholder text shown when nothing is selected.

name: ZaddSelectMenuOption
description: Adds an option to the current string select menu. Must be called after ZnewSelectMenu.

args.name: label
args.description: The user-facing label for this option.

args.name: value
args.description: The value sent to your bot when this option is selected.

args.name: description
args.description: Optional description shown below the label.

args.name: default
args.description: Whether this option is selected by default.

args.name: emoji
args.description: Emoji to display next to the option.

errors: no select menu — call ZnewSelectMenu first

examples.output: Adds a Red option with value 'red'

name: ZaddTextInput
description: Adds a text input field to the current modal. Must be called after ZnewModal.

args.name: fieldID
args.description: The ID used to read this field's value with ZinputValue.

args.name: label
args.description: The label shown above the text input.

args.name: style
args.description: Input style: short (single line) or paragraph (multi-line).

args.name: required
args.description: Whether the field must be filled in.

args.name: placeholder
args.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input.

name: ZaddUserSelect
description: Adds a user select menu to the response. Users can pick from server members.

args.name: menuID
args.description: The custom ID used to identify this menu in onInteraction handlers.

args.name: min
args.description: Minimum number of users that must be selected.

args.name: max
args.description: Maximum number of users that can be selected.

args.name: placeholder
args.description: Placeholder text shown when nothing is selected.

name: ZafkChannelID
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZafkTimeout
description: Returns server metadata or performs server operations.

name: ZallMembersCount
description: Returns information for the allMembersCount function.

name: ZallowRoleMentions
description: 0 args  → no role pings allowed on this response.

name: ZallowUserMentions
description: 0 args  → no user pings allowed on this response.

name: ZargCount
description: Returns information for the argCount function.
syntax: ZargCount{text} — counts space-separated words in the text.

name: ZargsCheck
description: Halts with error if the number of space-separated args in ctx.message.

name: Zasync
description: Spawns the code block in a background tokio task identified by name. Returns immediately without blocking. Use Zawait{name} to collect its text output. Side-effects (DB writes, variable changes) are applied to the shared execution context.

args.name: name
args.description: A unique identifier for this async block.

args.name: code
args.description: The code block to run in the background.

examples.output: Runs block in background, waits at Zawait.

name: Zauthor
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZauthorIcon
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
errors: ZauthorIcon requires an author to be set first
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZauthorURL
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
errors: ZauthorURL requires an author to be set first
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: Zawait
description: Blocks until the named async task (started with Zasync{name;...}) finishes, then returns its text output. Each block can only be awaited once.

args.name: name
args.description: The name matching the Zasync block.

name: Zban
description: Returns information for the ban function.

name: ZblackListIDs
description: Halts if the author's ID is in the provided list.
errors: at least one user ID is required

name: ZblackListRoles
description: Halts if the author has any role matching the provided names.
errors: at least one role name is required

name: ZblackListRolesIDs
description: Halts if the author has any of the provided role IDs.
errors: at least one role ID is required
one or more invalid role IDs

name: ZblackListServers
description: Halts if the current guild is in the provided list.
errors: at least one server ID is required

name: ZblackListUsers
description: Halts if the author's username matches any in the provided list.
errors: at least one username is required

name: ZboostCount
description: Returns server metadata or performs server operations.

name: ZboostLevel
description: Returns server metadata or performs server operations.

name: ZbotCommands
description: Returns information for the botCommands function.

name: ZbotID
description: Returns information for the botID function.

name: ZbotOwnerID
description: Returns information for the botOwnerID function.

name: ZbotTyping
description: Returns information for the botTyping function.

name: ZbyteCount
description: Returns information for the byteCount function.
syntax: ZbyteCount{text} — returns the number of UTF-8 bytes in the text.

name: Zcalculate
description: Recursive-descent expression evaluator. Supports: + - * / % ** () and unary minus. Operator precedence (low → high): 1. + - 2. * / % 3. ** (right-associative) 4. unary - 5. atoms: numbers, parenthesised expressions.

name: ZcategoryChannels
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.
errors: category not found or is not a category

name: ZcategoryCount
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZcategoryID
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: Zceil
description: Returns the integer ceiling of the given number.

name: ZchangeCooldownTime
description: Overrides the label text used in cooldown time formatting.

name: ZchangeNickname
description: Returns user metadata or performs user operations.

name: ZchannelCount
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZchannelCreated
description: Returns the channel's creation timestamp as Unix seconds extracted from its snowflake ID. Defaults to current channel.

args.name: channelID
args.description: The channel ID to get the creation timestamp of.

name: ZchannelExists
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZchannelID
description: ZchannelID{name}   — find channel by name in the guild.

name: ZchannelInvites
description: Returns a space-separated list of invite codes for the given channel. Defaults to current channel.

args.name: channelID
args.description: The channel ID to fetch invites for.

name: ZchannelName
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZchannelNames
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZchannelPosition
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZchannelTopic
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZchannelType
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZchannelWebhooks
description: Returns a space-separated list of webhook URLs for the given channel. Defaults to current channel.

args.name: channelID
args.description: The channel ID to fetch webhooks for.

name: ZcharCount
description: Returns the number of Unicode characters (not bytes) in the text.

name: ZcheckCondition
description: Evaluates a condition string and returns "true" or "false".

name: ZcheckContains
description: Returns "true" if the text contains any of the provided words (case-insensitive).
errors: text and at least one word are required

name: ZcheckUserPerms
description: Returns "true" if the user has all provided permissions, "false" otherwise.

name: Zclear
description: Returns information for the clear function.

name: ZclearReactions
description: Use "!all" as emoji to clear all reactions.

name: Zcolor
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZcolorRole
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.
errors: role ID and color are required

name: ZcommandName
description: Returns information for the commandName function.

name: ZcommandsCount
description: Returns information for the commandsCount function.

name: ZcommandTrigger
description: Returns information for the commandTrigger function.

name: Zcooldown
description: Per-user per-server cooldown.

name: ZcreateChannel
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZcreateEvent
description: Creates a scheduled voice event and returns its ID. startTime is a Unix timestamp.

args.name: channelID
args.description: The voice channel ID for the event.

args.name: startTime
args.description: The Unix timestamp for when the event starts.

errors: startTime must be a Unix timestamp

name: ZcreateForumTag
description: Adds a new available tag to a forum channel.

args.name: name
args.description: The name of the new tag.

args.name: emoji
args.description: The emoji for the tag (unicode character or custom emoji ID).

name: ZcreateInvite
description: Creates a channel invite and returns the invite code. maxUses: 0 = unlimited (default). maxAge: seconds until expiry, 0 = never expires (default).

args.name: channelID
args.description: The channel to create the invite for.

args.name: maxAge
args.description: Seconds until the invite expires (0 = never).

name: ZcreatePost
description: Creates a new forum post (thread) and returns its thread ID. tagIDs is a space-separated list of forum tag IDs.

args.name: title
args.description: The title of the forum post.

args.name: content
args.description: The initial message content of the post.

args.name: tagIDs
args.description: Space-separated list of forum tag IDs to apply.

name: ZcreateRole
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.

name: ZcreationDate
description: Returns user metadata or performs user operations.

name: ZcropText
description: Crops text to maxChars characters. If cropped, appends 'ending'.

name: ZcustomEmoji
description: Returns the usable emoji string for a guild emoji by name, e.g. <:wave:123456>.

name: ZcustomID
description: Returns the custom_id of the current interaction. Only populated inside onInteraction handlers.

examples.output: Runs ban if the confirm button was clicked

name: Zdate
description: Returns the current date as YYYY-MM-DD.

name: Zday
description: Returns the current day of the month (1–31).

name: Zdeafen
description: Server-deafens a member in all voice channels. They cannot hear anything until undeafened.

args.name: userID
args.description: The ID of the member to server-deafen.

name: Zdefer
description: Defers the interaction response, showing a loading state. The bot then has 15 minutes to follow up.

name: Zdelay
description: Spawns a background task that sleeps for the given duration, then evaluates the code block. The task is in-memory and will be cancelled on bot restart.

args.name: duration
args.description: How long to wait before executing the code (e.g. 5s, 1m, 2h).

args.name: code
args.description: The code block to evaluate after the delay.

errors: duration must be at least 1 second

name: ZdeleteChannels
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.
errors: at least one channel ID is required

name: ZdeleteChannelsByName
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.
errors: at least one name is required

name: ZdeleteEvent
description: Deletes a scheduled event.

args.name: eventID
args.description: The scheduled event ID to delete.

name: ZdeleteForumTag
description: Removes a tag from a forum channel by its ID.

args.name: tagID
args.description: The forum tag ID to remove.

name: ZdeleteInvite
description: Deletes a Discord invite by its code.

name: ZdeleteMessage
description: Returns information for the deleteMessage function.

name: ZdeleteRole
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.

name: ZdeleteSticker
description: Deletes a sticker from the server.

name: Zdescription
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZdisplayName
description: Returns user metadata or performs user operations.

name: Zdiv
description: First arg is the starting value, divided by each subsequent arg. Zdiv{100;5;2} = 100 / 5 / 2 = 10.

name: Zdm
description: Returns information for the dm function.

name: ZdmChannelID
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZeditButton
description: Edits a button on an existing message.

args.name: customID
args.description: The custom ID of the button to edit.

args.name: style
args.description: New button style: primary, secondary, success, danger, or link.

args.name: disabled
args.description: Whether the button should be disabled.

args.name: messageID
args.description: ID of the message containing the button.

name: ZeditChannelPerms
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.
errors: channelID, userOrRoleID, and at least one permission are required

name: ZeditEvent
description: Edits a scheduled event. Use "!unchanged" to skip a field.

args.name: eventID
args.description: The scheduled event ID to edit.

args.name: startTime
args.description: The new start time as a Unix timestamp.

name: ZeditForumTag
description: Edits an existing forum tag. Use "!unchanged" to skip a field.

args.name: tagID
args.description: The forum tag ID to edit.

name: ZeditMessage
description: Returns information for the editMessage function.

name: ZeditSelectMenu
description: Edits a select menu on an existing message.

args.name: menuID
args.description: The custom ID of the select menu to edit.

args.name: messageID
args.description: ID of the message containing the select menu.

name: ZeditSelectMenuOption
description: Edits an option on an existing select menu.

args.name: menuID
args.description: The custom ID of the select menu.

args.name: default
args.description: Whether this option is selected by default.

args.name: messageID
args.description: ID of the message containing the select menu.

errors: failed to edit select menu option

name: ZeditSplitText
description: Replaces the element at the given 1-based index with a new value.

name: ZeditThread
description: Use "!unchanged" for any field you want to leave as-is.

name: ZemojiExists
description: Returns "true" if the emoji ID exists in the current server, "false" otherwise.

name: ZemojiName
description: Returns the name of a custom emoji by its ID.

name: ZemoteCount
description: Returns the total number of custom emojis (static + animated) in the server.

name: Zenabled
description: Returns information for the enabled function.

name: ZendsWith
description: Returns true if text ends with suffix, false otherwise.

name: Zephemeral
description: Returns information for the ephemeral function.
syntax: Zephemeral{} — makes the slash command response only visible to the invoker.

name: Zerror
description: Returns information for the error function.
syntax: Zerror{message} — halts execution with a custom user-facing error message.

name: Zeval
description: Evaluates a string as ZBR code. Each statement in the string is parsed and executed in order.

args.name: code
args.description: The ZBR code string to evaluate.

name: ZeventChannel
description: Returns the channel ID of a scheduled event, or empty string for external events.

name: ZeventCount
description: Returns the number of scheduled events in the server.

name: ZeventDescription
description: Returns the description of a scheduled event.

name: ZeventEnd
description: Returns the end time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp, or empty string if none set.

name: ZeventName
description: Returns the name of a scheduled event.

name: ZeventStart
description: Returns the start time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp.

name: ZeventStatus
description: Returns the status of a scheduled event: scheduled, active, completed, or cancelled.

name: ZeventSubscribers
description: Returns the number of users subscribed to a scheduled event.

name: ZexecutionTime
description: Returns information for the executionTime function.

name: Zfloor
description: Returns the integer portion of the given number.

name: Zfooter
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZfooterIcon
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
errors: ZfooterIcon requires a footer to be set first
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZforJson
description: Iterates over a JSON array at the given key path. ZloopIndex{} returns the current 1-based position, ZloopValue{} returns the current element. Requires a parsed JSON object (ZjsonParse).

args.name: key
args.description: One or more key path segments to navigate to the target array.

args.name: code
args.description: The code block to execute for each element.

errors: at least one key and a code block are required
no JSON object — call ZjsonParse first

name: ZforSplit
description: Iterates over the current split text (set by ZtextSplit). ZloopIndex{} returns the current 1-based position, ZloopValue{} returns the current element.

args.name: code
args.description: The code block to execute for each split element.

errors: no split text available — call ZtextSplit first

name: ZforumPostCount
description: Returns the number of active posts in a forum channel.

name: ZforumPosts
description: Returns a space-separated list of active post (thread) IDs in a forum channel.

name: ZforumTagEmoji
description: Returns the emoji of a forum tag. For unicode emojis returns the character, for custom emojis returns the emoji ID.

name: ZforumTagID
description: Finds a forum tag's ID by its name (case-insensitive). Returns empty string if not found.

args.name: tagName
args.description: The tag name to look up.

name: ZforumTagModerated
description: Returns true if the forum tag is moderator-only, false otherwise.

name: ZforumTags
description: Returns a space-separated list of available tag names in a forum channel.

name: ZfromTimestamp
description: Formats a Unix timestamp into a date/time string. format options: full (default), date, time, relative.

args.name: format
args.description: The output format: full, date, time, or relative.

name: ZgetAttachments
description: No index = all attachment URLs joined by newline.

name: ZgetBanReason
description: Returns information for the getBanReason function.

name: ZgetChannelVar
description: Gets or sets persistent variables.

name: ZgetCooldown
description: Returns remaining seconds on the cooldown.

name: ZgetEmbedData
description: type: title, description, footer, color, image, timestamp.

name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserCount
description: Returns the number of users/roles selected in a mentionable select interaction.

name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserID
description: Returns the user or role ID at the given 1-based index from a mentionable select interaction.

args.name: index
args.description: 1-based index of the selected user or role.

name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserIDs
description: Returns all selected user/role IDs from a mentionable select interaction, joined by a separator.

args.name: limit
args.description: Maximum number of IDs to return (0 = all).

name: ZgetMessage
description: type: content (default), authorID, username, avatar.

name: ZgetReactions
description: Returns a list of usernames who reacted with the given emoji.
errors: requires channelID, messageID, separator, and emoji

name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleCount
description: Returns the number of roles selected in a role select interaction.

name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleID
description: Returns the role ID at the given 1-based index from a role select interaction.

name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleIDs
description: Returns all selected role IDs from a role select interaction, joined by a separator.

args.name: limit
args.description: Maximum number of IDs to return (0 = all).

name: ZgetServerVar
description: Gets or sets persistent variables.

name: ZgetSlowmode
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZgetTextSplitIndex
description: Returns the 1-based index of the first element matching value.

name: ZgetTextSplitLength
description: Returns the number of elements in the current split.

name: ZgetTimestamp
description: Returns the current Unix timestamp.

name: ZgetUserSelectUserCount
description: Returns the number of users selected in a user select interaction.

name: ZgetUserSelectUserID
description: Returns the user ID at the given 1-based index from a user select interaction.

examples.output: Returns the first selected user's ID

name: ZgetUserSelectUserIDs
description: Returns all selected user IDs from a user select interaction, joined by a separator.

args.name: limit
args.description: Maximum number of IDs to return (0 = all).

name: ZgetUserVar
description: Gets or sets persistent variables.

name: ZgetVar
description: Gets or sets persistent variables.

name: ZglobalCooldown
description: Per-user cooldown across all servers.

name: ZguildBanner
description: Returns server metadata or performs server operations.

name: ZguildExists
description: Returns server metadata or performs server operations.

name: ZguildID
description: Returns information for the guildID function.

name: ZhasRole
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.

name: ZhighestRole
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.

name: ZhighestRoleWithPerms
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.
errors: at least one permission is required

name: Zhour
description: Returns the current hour (0–23).

name: ZhttpAddHeader
description: Adds a header that will be sent with all subsequent HTTP requests in this execution.

name: ZhttpDelete
description: Returns information for the httpDelete function.

name: ZhttpGet
description: Returns information for the httpGet function.

name: ZhttpGetHeader
description: Returns the value of a header previously set via ZhttpAddHeader.

name: ZhttpPatch
description: Returns information for the httpPatch function.

name: ZhttpPost
description: Returns information for the httpPost function.

name: ZhttpPut
description: Returns information for the httpPut function.

name: ZhttpRemoveHeader
description: Removes a header previously set via ZhttpAddHeader.

name: ZhttpResult
description: Reads the response body of the last HTTP request and navigates into it using.

name: ZhttpStatus
description: Returns the HTTP status code of the last HTTP request made in this execution.

name: Zif
description: Zif is handled as a special case in Runtime::evaluate (lazy evaluation). This stub is never called — the runtime intercepts "if" before resolving args.
errors: internal error: Zif should be handled by the runtime

name: ZignoreChannels
description: Halts if the current channel is in the provided list.
errors: at least one channel ID is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: Zimage
description: Returns embed metadata or updates embed content.
notes: Embed setter function; returns nothing and writes to the selected embed index.

name: ZindexOf
description: Returns the 1-based character position of the first match of search in text, or 0 if not found.

name: ZinputValue
description: Reads a submitted modal text input field value. Only valid inside an onInteraction handler for a modal submission.

args.name: fieldID
args.description: The field ID as set in ZaddTextInput.

examples.output: Returns the text the user typed in the 'feedback' field

name: ZinviteInfo
description: Returns server metadata or performs server operations.

name: ZisAdmin
description: Returns user metadata or performs user operations.

name: ZisBanned
description: Returns information for the isBanned function.

name: ZisBoolean
description: Returns information for the isBoolean function.
syntax: ZisBoolean{value} — returns "true" if value is exactly "true" or "false".

name: ZisBooster
description: Returns user metadata or performs user operations.

name: ZisBot
description: Returns user metadata or performs user operations.

name: ZisEmojiAnimated
description: Returns "true" if the emoji is animated, "false" otherwise.

name: ZisHoisted
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.
errors: could not get author's top role

name: ZisInteger
description: Returns information for the isInteger function.
syntax: ZisInteger{value} — returns "true" if value parses as a whole number (no decimal point).

name: ZisInVoice
description: Returns true if the user is currently in any voice channel, false otherwise.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user to check. Defaults to the command author.

name: ZisMentionable
description: Returns role metadata or performs role operations.
errors: could not get author's top role

name: ZisMentioned
description: Returns "true" if the user is mentioned in the triggering message.

name: ZisMessageEdited
description: Returns information for the isMessageEdited function.

name: ZisModerator
description: Returns true if the user has the Moderate Members (timeout) permission, false otherwise. Defaults to the command author.

name: ZisNSFW
description: Returns channel metadata or performs channel operations.

name: ZisNumber
description: Returns information for the isNumber function.
syntax: ZisNumber{value} — returns "true" if value parses as any number (integer or float).

name: ZisSlash
description: Slash commands have no trigger prefix (ctx.trigger is None).
syntax: ZisSlash{} — returns "true" if the current command was triggered as a slash command.

name: ZisTimedOut
description: Returns information for the isTimedOut function.

name: ZisUserDMEnabled
description: Returns user metadata or performs user operations.

name: ZisValidHex
description: Returns information for the isValidHex function.
syntax: ZisValidHex{value} — returns "true" if value is a valid hex color (#RRGGBB or RRGGBB).

name: ZjoinSplitText
description: Joins all split elements with the given separator.

name: ZjsonArray
description: Creates an empty array at the given key path.
errors: at least one key is required

name: ZjsonArrayAppend
description: Appends a value to the end of the array at the given key path.
errors: at least one key and a value are required
at least one key is required
no JSON object — call ZjsonParse or ZjsonArray first

name: ZjsonArrayCount
description: Returns the number of elements in the array at the given key path.
errors: at least one key is required

name: ZjsonArrayIndex
description: Returns the 0-based index of the first occurrence of value in the array.
errors: at least one key and a value are required
at least one key is required

name: ZjsonArrayPop
description: Removes and returns the last element of the array at the given key path.
errors: at least one key is required
no JSON object — call ZjsonParse or ZjsonArray first

name: ZjsonArrayReverse
description: Reverses the array at the given key path in place.
errors: at least one key is required
no JSON object — call ZjsonParse or ZjsonArray first

name: ZjsonArrayShift
description: Removes and returns the first element of the array at the given key path.
errors: at least one key is required
no JSON object — call ZjsonParse or ZjsonArray first

name: ZjsonArraySort
description: Sorts the array at the given key path in place (ascending, lexicographic for strings,.
errors: at least one key is required
no JSON object — call ZjsonParse or ZjsonArray first

name: ZjsonArrayUnshift
description: Inserts a value at the front of the array at the given key path.
errors: at least one key and a value are required
at least one key is required
no JSON object — call ZjsonParse or ZjsonArray first

name: ZjsonClear
description: Clears the working JSON object for this execution.

name: ZjsonExists
description: Returns "true" if the key path exists in the working JSON object, "false" otherwise.
errors: at least one key is required

name: ZjsonGet
description: Returns the value at the given key path in the working JSON object.
errors: at least one key is required

name: ZjsonJoinArray

name: ZonlyAdmin
description: Halts unless the author has Administrator permission.
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyBotChannelPerms
description: Halts unless the bot has all provided permissions in the specified channel.
errors: channelID and at least one permission are required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyBotPerms
description: Halts unless the bot itself has all provided permissions in the guild.
errors: at least one permission is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyForCategories
description: Halts unless the current channel belongs to one of the provided categories.
errors: at least one category ID is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyForChannels
description: Halts unless the current channel is in the provided list.
errors: at least one channel ID is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyForIDs
description: Halts unless the author's ID is in the provided list.
errors: at least one user ID is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyForRoleIDs
description: Halts unless the author has any of the provided role IDs.
errors: at least one role ID is required
one or more invalid role IDs
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyForRoles
description: Halts unless the author has any of the provided roles (matched by name).
errors: at least one role name is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyForServers
description: Halts unless the current guild is in the provided list.
errors: at least one server ID is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyForUsers
description: Halts unless the author's username matches one of the provided names.
errors: at least one username is required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyIf
description: Guard function — halts execution with the error message if the condition is false.

name: ZonlyIfMessageContains
description: Halts with error if the message does not contain ALL of the provided words.
errors: message, at least one word, and an error message are required
notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.

name: ZonlyNSFW
description: Halts unless the current channel is marked as NSFW.

name: ZonlyPerms
description: Halts unless the author has all provided permissions.

notes: Permission guard function; returns nothing and halts on failure.
